title: SR 20-23: Interagency Order Granting an Exemption from Customer Identification Program Requirements for Loans Extended by Banks and Their Subsidiaries to All Customers to Facilitate Purchases of Property and Casualty Insurance Policies
title_normalized: Interagency Order Granting an Exemption from Customer Identification Program Requirements for Loans Extended by Banks and Their Subsidiaries to All Customers to Facilitate Purchases of Property and Casualty Insurance Policies
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 20-23
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This order applies to all banking organizations supervised by the Federal Reserve that are subject to Customer Identification Program requirements under the Bank Secrecy Act.1
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
bm25_text: SR 20-23 Interagency Order Granting an Exemption from Customer Identification Program Requirements for Loans Extended by Banks and Their Subsidiaries to All Customers to Facilitate Purchases of Property and Casualty Insurance Policies This order applies to all banking organizations supervised by the Federal Reserve that are subject to Customer Identification Program requirements under the Bank Secrecy Act.1 BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT:
vector_text_prefix: Federal Reserve SR Letter SR 20-23: Interagency Order Granting an Exemption from Customer Identification Program Requirements for Loans Extended by Banks and Their Subsidiaries to All Customers to Facilitate Purchases of Property and Casualty Insurance Policies
